programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 2
programme.desc: This is a vibrant land at the southernmost tip of China. After the island separated from the mainland due to continental rifting, 442 species of wild animals and plants gradually evolved into species endemic to Hainan. This episode documents the story of a family of Hainan gibbons - the park’s flagship species - raising their young, and also features amphibians, reptiles, and other plant and animal species unique to Hainan.

programme.title: Let's Go Home S3 - EP 3

Led by host Bowie Tsang, the show brings together a lineup of cross-industry celebrity guests - including Hsieh Ying-Hsuan, Annie Chen, Ethan Ruan, Tanya Chua and more - as they embark on a heartfelt journey home, rediscovering their most genuine connections with their hometowns, families, and themselves.

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 4
programme.desc: In the polar aquarium, visitors can see many fascinating creatures from the polar regions. Yet, there’s one animal that appears only during its daily playtime - the California sea lion. Amid the joyful crowds, trainer Fu Nailu can’t help but feel a bit anxious, as the sea lion he has been training is about to give birth.

programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 2
programme.desc: This is a vibrant land at the southernmost tip of China. After the island separated from the mainland due to continental rifting, 442 species of wild animals and plants gradually evolved into species endemic to Hainan. This episode documents the story of a family of Hainan gibbons - the park’s flagship species - raising their young, and also features amphibians, reptiles, and other plant and animal species unique to Hainan.

programme.title: Red Shoes - EP 4
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 157
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 611
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 105
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 157
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 611
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 106
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 158
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Kita Ngeri Ngeri Sedap
programme.desc: Sasi (Larasati Nugroho) is a martial arts expert and a gifted athlete, yet she constantly suffers from bad luck-mostly caused by Juna (Hardi Fadhillah). However, as Sasi faces a string of heartbreaks and betrayals from her boyfriends, she realizes that Juna is the only one who has ever truly stayed by her side through thick and thin.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 612
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 106
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 612

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 106
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 158
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 612
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 107
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Yang Menyala
programme.desc: Indri (Shanice Margaretha) is a hardworking independent woman who sells traditional herbal medicine (jamu) on her old bicycle. One day, she accidentally crashes into Pras (Cakrawala Airawan), an executive rushing to an important meeting. Their paths cross again when a frustrated Indri finds Pras outside her house, unintentionally making a mess of her laundry.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 159
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jodoh Itu, Ketuk Pintu Dulu! Jangan Main Bablas
programme.desc: While Cila’s (Ersya Aurelia) crispy fish skin (basreng) business is booming, her love life is a disaster-especially after being betrayed by her best friend. She meets Eril (Cakrawala Airawan), whose mother disapproves of his current girlfriend. Cila and Eril decide to form a business partnership with Eril as her fish supplier, united by their shared success and a common enemy named Roy.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 613
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 107
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Yang Menyala
programme.desc: Indri (Shanice Margaretha) is a hardworking independent woman who sells traditional herbal medicine (jamu) on her old bicycle. One day, she accidentally crashes into Pras (Cakrawala Airawan), an executive rushing to an important meeting. Their paths cross again when a frustrated Indri finds Pras outside her house, unintentionally making a mess of her laundry.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 7
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 12
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Potong - EP 14
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang pemuda Midun, yang kini menyambung legasi perkhidmatan berkhatan tradisional peninggalan arwah bapanya, seorang Tok Mudim handal di kampung.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 24
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 4
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 9
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 12
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live Tour 2025 - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk semua.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 14
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 13
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 25
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Nabil dan Angah menemu bual artis artis tanah air di atas trak dan saksikan mereka menyanyi di akhir rancangan

programme.title: Pecah Perut - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah program sketsa komedi yang menampilkan barisan pelawak dan pelakon popular seperti Kamal Adli, Sherry Al-Hadad, Shahrul Shiro, Mamak Puteh dan ramai lagi

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 10
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 24
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 13

programme.title: Busker
programme.desc: Vera jatuh hati dengan kawan kolejnya, Adil. Tetapi Adil menganggapnya hanya sebagai kawan, ketika dia cuba bangkit semula setelah ditinggalkan kekasihnya. Apakah Adil akan jatuh cinta dengan Vera?

programme.title: Bila Aidil Ada Fitri - EP 12
programme.desc: Pada Raya tahun lepas, Fitri dan Aidilmempunyai masalah dimana Fitri soal jodoh Aidil pula putus tunang. Fitri menyelamatkan Datin Mariam dari diragut dan dia meminta Fitri menjadi P.A anaknya.

programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 10

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 4 - EP 13
programme.desc: Candawara masak-memasak paling gempak ini menyaksikan persaingan di antara jaguh-jaguh kampung

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 6
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 25
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Romeo Returns - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan jejaka idaman Malaya bersatu dalam sebuah program realiti yang bakal mencabar mereka dengan pelbagai aktiviti yang menguji keupayaan fizikal dan mental jejaka terhangat di pasaran ini.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia - EP 4
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal 30 minit yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan.

programme.title: Healing With Zizan - EP 6
programme.desc: Dua selebriti lelaki tanahair yang akan ditemu bual oleh Zizan tentang Hijrah mereka, berkongsi pandangan dan perjalanan rohani mereka tentang apa yang mendorong mereka untuk maju ke hadapan

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live Tour 2025 - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk semua.

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 3
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 5
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 11
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Boss Kira S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Diterajui oleh Sherry Alhadad, Roy Azman & Haiqal Hairuddin dibantu selebriti jemputan demi merebut hadiah tunai dua kali ganda bernilai RM1 juta dengan beberapa syarat.

programme.title: Gelak Gempak - EP 3
programme.desc: Perjalanan pencarian pelawak "stand up" terunggul di Malaysia bermula bersama Dato’ Afdlin Shauki, Harith Iskander, Nabil and Douglas Lim di kelab-kelab komedi tempatan.

programme.title: Ini Malam Kita Punya - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancangan bual bicara yang akan di hoskan oleh Nabil Ahmad yang akan mengetengahkan sketch lawak dan temu bual bersama artis-artis terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Lawak Ke Dik? - EP 5
programme.desc: Program untuk kanak-kanak bagi menyuarakan pendapat dan berkongsi buah fikiran mereka secara spontan.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 10
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Cakap Melayu Lah! - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah sitcom yang berkisarkan tentang Encik Daud, Puan Rozita, Mak Som, Abdul dan beberapa pelajar di sebuah sekolah bahasa di KL.

programme.title: Tak Kot - EP 11
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular tanah air bercuti sambil dicabar menangani fobia yang terdapat dalam diri mereka. Berjayakah mereka menyelesaikan misi?

programme.title: Bila Aidil Ada Fitri - EP 13
programme.desc: Pada Raya tahun lepas, Fitri dan Aidilmempunyai masalah dimana Fitri soal jodoh Aidil pula putus tunang. Fitri menyelamatkan Datin Mariam dari diragut dan dia meminta Fitri menjadi P.A anaknya.

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 5
programme.desc: Rancangan permainan penuh cabaran untuk 3 peserta, cabaran di sediakan untuk mendapatkan hanya satu pemenang.

programme.title: Lawak Ke Der Tak Coverline - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 5
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Ini Malam Kita Punya - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancangan bual bicara yang akan di hoskan oleh Nabil Ahmad yang akan mengetengahkan sketch lawak dan temu bual bersama artis-artis terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Rumah No 107 - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai bersama keluarga Tok K, Joey, Man, Ropie & Bibik Cha. Saksikan telatah lucu mereka bersama tetamu undangan dan cameo yang bakal mengejutkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 9
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 3 - EP 13
programme.desc: Saksikan para peserta yang mewakili kampung masing masing bertanding dalam acara memasak dengan menu ala kampung.

programme.title: Gelak 90 Saat S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Mampukah 6 kumpulan pelawak membuat para juri misteri ketawa dalam masa 90 saat demi merebut ganjaran wang tunai pada setiap minggu?

programme.title: Karoot Komedia - EP 6
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal 30 minit yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan.

programme.title: Temasya Sukan Kelaut - EP 1
programme.desc: Program sukan yang diselitkan elemen komedi dengan menampilkan barisan pelawak tanah air serta barisan selebriti sukan terkenal.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 4
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Impiana S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kini Impiana lebih berarah kepada golongan Malaynial, dipenuhi dengan segmen yang penuh inspirasi bertujuan untuk dijadikan destinasi rujukan bagi penonton mencari idea untuk hiasan rumah mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 34
programme.desc: Luqman terkejut apabila Aniq mengambil tindakan melulu untuk menjual produk baru. Nazri memberi amaran tegas kepada Haslin. Luqman dapat menjejaki Qistina.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 50
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Roti Cicah Susu - EP 9
programme.desc: Empat orang anak yatim terpisah. Selepas 15 tahun, mereka bertemu semula dan cuba untuk mencari jawapan tentang apa yang berlaku sehingga membuka banyak rahsia yang tak sepatutnya diketahui.

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis - EP 21
programme.desc: Pertemuan Kris dan Salsa bermula ketika Kris membawa diri pulang ke kampung Tok Abah. Salsa kini menghadapi tuduhan pecah amanah.

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin 2: Shalin - EP 13
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang 3 remaja wanita dari latarbelakang keluarga yang berbeza mengejar gelaran Ratu Tenpin Negara.

programme.title: Lelaki Macam Dia - EP 2
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: 7 Minggu Sebelum Kahwin
programme.desc: Hanya tinggal 7 minggu saja tarikh perkahwinan, pelbagai masalah menimpa Amar dan Syifa yang mengganggu persiapan dan menduga cinta mereka.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 14
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Resepi Memikat Isteri - EP 4
programme.desc: Musim kali ini giliran suami untuk memujuk dan memikat isteri pula melalui masakan mereka. Di hoskan oleh Jihan Muse

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Gen F - EP 4

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 34
programme.desc: Luqman terkejut apabila Aniq mengambil tindakan melulu untuk menjual produk baru. Nazri memberi amaran tegas kepada Haslin. Luqman dapat menjejaki Qistina.

programme.title: Honey Trap - EP 8
programme.desc: Serangan maut Aziz ke atas Masraya, mengheret MSB dan seluruh negara ke ambang kehancuran. Surya dan Shidi bersatu untuk hapuskan Aziz namun mereka mungkin berdepan kehilangan sebuah kebenaran dan cinta.

programme.title: Lara Ati - EP 15

programme.title: JMT - EP 13

programme.title: Mat Dan Kaki Jalan - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah travelog santai tentang perjalanan dan percutian seorang lelaki Inggeris Daniel Tayler atau dikenali sebagai Mat Dan berasal dari Cheltenham England ke Malaysia.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 35
programme.desc: Luqman kecewa kerana isteri Nik sanggup menipu supaya Luqman tidak daripada berjumpa dengan Qistina. Amanda terpaksa melayan karenah Haslin.

programme.title: Abang Long Fadil 3

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 5
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Impiana S4 - EP 2

programme.title: Roti Cicah Susu - EP 10

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis - EP 22

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin 2: Shalin - EP 14

programme.title: Sejuta Rasa Buat Adelia - EP 9

programme.title: Kampung Boy S1 - EP 5

programme.title: Dee The Series - EP 12

programme.title: Kultus - EP 3

programme.title: Honey Trap - EP 5

programme.title: Honey Trap - EP 6

programme.title: Honey Trap - EP 7

programme.desc: Follows an Indian diplomat who tries to repatriate an Indian girl from foreign land, where she was presumably forced and deceived into marrying against her will.

programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.desc: When a singer disappears during a serial killer spree, a taxidriver and a businessman's son cross paths in a disturbing tale where the lines between good and evil are blurred.

programme.title: Tuesdays & Fridays
programme.desc: Two millennials get into a relationship where they are allowed to meet only on 'Tuesdays , Fridays'.

programme.title: Taana
programme.desc: This is about a life struggle of a man who's trying to become a policeman as his family members wish and forced him to become police and save their village.

programme.desc: The High Priestess approaches the large cauldron and throws in a handful of amangnlina leaves. Suddenly, coloured steam rises from the cauldron to the amazement of the watching children.

programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 36
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 45
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 46
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Alex Hugo - EP 24
programme.desc: The body of a ranger is found deep in a nature reserve closed to visitors. He lived alone, isolated on the shores of a mountain lake. And so begins a particularly strange investigation: very few people, all scientists, were to be found in this lonely spot, cut-off from the world.

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: Le Mystere De La Chambre Jaune
programme.desc: Following the attempted murder of Mathilde, daughter of the Professor Strangerson, the young reporter Rouletabille head for chateau du Glandier to clear up the mystery. Who is the murderer? What is his motive? And above all how did he escape from a yellow bedroom which was locked from the inside?

programme.title: Mines Antipersonnel, La Guerre Des Laches
programme.desc: Ottawa, December 1997. 122 countries sign the convention on the prohibition of anti-personnel mines, 42 other countries rapidly follow. Today, 25 years after coming into force on 1 March 1999, what is its real impact? Senegal, Colombia, Ukraine: we join some of the NGOs and humanitarian workers in the field.

programme.title: Les Enfants De Buchenwald, Une Action Humanitaire Suisse
programme.desc: After the German capitulation in 1945, Switzerland, accused of having prolonged its economic relations with the Nazi regime, attempted to restore its reputation by welcoming two thousand young survivors of the concentration camps. An action that did not unfold as planned, in a context marked by antisemitism. Testimonies.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 10
programme.desc: From the south to the northwest of France, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde studies the inspirations and styles of the different coasts.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 21
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 22
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Dounia - EP 6
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 41
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 27
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 12
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 39
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 40
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 34
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 15
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 25
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 11
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 86
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Between France, Canada and Switzerland, Magloire Delcros-Varaud meets inspiring personalities who have chosen professions based on transmission and commitment. They all embody a connected generation in search of meaning and authenticity. Through them, he gives voice to a strong and committed Francophonie.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: A key figure from the world of sport looks back at a particular competition, a career, an outstanding moment.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Sur Le Front - EP 7
programme.desc: In the 1960s, 3% of French people were allergic to pollen, compared to 30% today. How to explain it? CO2 emissions, fine particles, pollen season, ragweed... Hugo Clement investigates. Fortunately, people across the country are fighting against allergenic plants.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 4
programme.desc: Pissarro-Pontoise Art and History Museum displays the impressionist master's works. Mathieu Bassee and the team at Studio MTX are inspired by materials to embroider space. Miu Miu mixes genders and breaks codes. Sculptor and jewellery designer Chloe Valorso creates dreamlike objects inspired by animals, plants and minerals.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 19
programme.desc: On the menu: green beans in vinaigrette sauce, fresh homemade pasta, mushroom tagliatelle, brownie biscuits.

programme.title: Parlons Eco - EP 10
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Taratata 100% Live - EP 4
programme.desc: With Shaka Ponk, Zazie, Sun Brutal Pop, Philippe Katerine, Serge Rezvani, The Warning

programme.title: Meurtres A Chartres
programme.desc: While a wedding is taking place in Chartres Cathedral, one of the witnesses is found dead in the crypt. The investigation is entrusted to Captains Victoire and Pierre Templard. The husband and wife police team soon realise that the murder is linked to the legend of the mysterious pregnant Virgin.

programme.title: Movie - Dharmapuri
programme.desc: A rich landlord forces Sivaram's father, an honest hardworking man, to leave the village. However, years later, the villagers beg Sivaraman to save them from the cruel landlord and his sons.

programme.title: Movie - Vizha
programme.desc: Sundaram, a 'Parai' artist, falls in love with Raakkamma, who sings at the funerals. But his love life runs into trouble while helping his friend's romance.

programme.title: Movie - Veeran Veluthambi
programme.desc: Veeran Veluthambi is a 1987 Tamil-language action film directed by Rama Narayanan, starring Vijayakanth and Radha Ravi.

programme.title: Movie - Vengayin Maindhan
programme.desc: Three gangsters rape and kill young women in a village and claim that they were killed by a leopard. The same fate approaches the lady-love of a snake charmer, and he sets out to take revenge on them.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kummi Pattu
programme.desc: A son assumes that his father killed his mother and in a fit of rage, he also rapes the woman who was to marry his step-brother. However, the woman decides to help him overcome his misgivings.

programme.title: Movie - Pasupathi Mey Paa Rasakka Palayam
programme.desc: Pasupathy, whose world revolves around his mother, comes to Chennai and gets a job at a police station. When his mother needs heart surgery, he's ready to go to any length to raise the required funds.

programme.title: Movie - Nayagan
programme.desc: Velu Nayakan, who witnesses the brutal murder of his father, kills a corrupt policeman and escapes to Mumbai, only to become a gangster.

programme.title: Movie - Santhithavelai
programme.desc: On a trip, Aadalarasu meets his lookalike and promises to fulfil the latter's request. His look-alike dies and he takes his place in his family while his own family thinks he is dead.

programme.title: Movie - Annai Kalikambal
programme.desc: Two sisters, Parvathi and Eshwari, are devotees of Goddess Kaaligaambaal. When their aunt is told that the birth of Eshwari's baby will lead to her death, she devises an evil plan.

programme.title: Movie - Goa
programme.desc: Three young men who always get into trouble in their village dream of an honest life. They escape to Madurai and find that their friend has married a rich foreigner. Seeing him revel in great luxury, they decide to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Day 4 Round 2 (Live)
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Copa Colsanitas Colsubsidio (250) Final
programme.desc: The Copa Colsanitas is a women's professional tennis tournament held in Bogotá, Colombia, at the Country Club de Bogotá. Held since 1998, this WTA 250 tournament is played on outdoor clay courts.

programme.title: WTA All Access 2026
programme.desc: This show brings you compelling stories, player personalities, tournament colour and fan engagement as well as exclusive analysis of statistical trends and data.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Tour of Oman Stage 5 H/Ls
programme.desc: Catch all the excitement from Stage 5 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists ride their way through the ancient city of Nizwa to the stunning finishing line.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026 UCI Pro Series - Muscat Classic Final H/Ls
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 U.S. Men's Clay Court C'ship (250) Day 3 R2 Session 2
programme.desc: The U.S. Men's Clay Court Championships is an annual ATP Tour 250 tennis tournament held at the River Oaks Country Club in Houston, Texas. Founded in 1910, it is the only remaining tournament in the United States played on clay courts.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Upper Austria Ladies Linz (500) Final
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: European C'ships 2026 Finals
programme.desc: The 2026 European Badminton Championships is the 32nd edition of the continental championship and will be held in Huelva, Spain. The tournament is used to determine the European champion in all five categories (Men’s Singles/Doubles, Women’s Singles/Doubles, Mixed Doubles).

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) R16 Session 1
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) R16 Session 2
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: Senior PGA Championship 2026 (Live)
programme.desc: The Senior PGA Championship, established in 1937, is the oldest of the 5 major championships in men's senior golf. It is administered by the Professional Golfers' Association of America and is recognized as a major championship by both PGA Tour Champions and the European Senior Tour. The inaugural event was played 88 years ago in 1937 at Augusta National Golf Club. Golfers compete for the prize fund of USD$3.5 million.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 35
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 13 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 32. Friday's game sees West Ham host Wolves, Arsenal welcome Bournemouth, Liverpool take on Fulham, and Manchester United close out the round against Leeds United.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 46
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 7
programme.desc: Former Premier League enforcer Kolo Toure joins Will Perry in the locker room as he unveils his top 10 Premier League moments.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 23
programme.desc: For Nico Gonzalez, arriving at Manchester City on deadline day in February 2025 was a full circle moment. The son of Francisco Gonzalez, who amassed over 500 appearances for Deportivo La Coruna and went on to be a youth coach at the Etihad from 2016 to 2019, his connection with the Blue side of Manchester was a big factor in his transfer from Porto.

programme.desc: He's fondly remembered for grabbing the last gasp goal that won Manchester City their first Premier League title back in 2012, and with 184 goals in just 275 appearances it clear to see why Sergio Aguero has been inducted into the hall of fame. programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Alfonso Gomez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Arturo Gatti facing off with Alfonso Gomez in what would be Gatti's final boxing match. Also on the card, Andre Berto takes on veteran Carlos Quintana on his way to stardom.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Takakeisho, Tokushoryu, Kagayaki and Enho.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Heath Todd
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (61-3-1 29 KO) vs. Heath Todd (32-10-0 13 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from the War Memorial Auditorium in Ft. Lauderdale FL USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA JP Buys vs. Luthando Biko
programme.desc: This episode features a Bantamweight championship bout as current champion JP Buys faces off against interm champion Luthando Biko. Bonus coverage includes Shaun De Lange vs. Marcel Teniers and Wade Kerspuy vs. Josemar Octavio.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBC middleweight title bout between Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (45-2, 24 KOs) and Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on November 20, 2010.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Floyd Mayweather Jr vs. Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: This episode features the WBC World super welterweight title between Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and Oscar De La Hoya that made $165 million in total gross revenue, making it the richest fight ever, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Women's CMX Form and Weapons and Girl's Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Shohozan, Yutakayama, Endo and Okinoumi

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: FS MMA Yves Edwards vs. Mike Thomas Brown
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features Mike Thomas Brown vs. Yves "Thugjitsu Master" Edwards. These two will clash in a heated battle as part of BodogFIGHT's Clash of the Nations in St. Petersburg, Russia.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Gabriel Martinez vs. Serhiy Dzinziruk
programme.desc: This episode features a bout for the vacant WBC diamond middleweight title, as Sergio Gabriel 'Maravilla' Martinez (46-2, 25 KOs) takes on fellow southpaw Serhiy Dzinziruk, aka 'Dzyna Razor' (37-0. 24 KOs). This fight took place from Foxwoods Resort Casino in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA, on March 12, 2011. Martinez was the reigning Fighter of the Year coming into the fight and vacated his WBC Middleweight title in order to fight the undefeated former champion Dzinziruk.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Victor Ortiz vs. Marcos Rene Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle of knockout artists as Victor Ortiz, entering with eight straight knockout wins, faces Marcos Maidana, who has knockouts in 24 of his 25 victories. The winner of this bout will be crowned the interim WBA light welterweight champion.

programme.title: World Karate Federation

Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 84
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po enjoy a game of musical statues. It takes the Teletubbies a few turns to work out what to do when the music stops; they must stand very still.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'plane' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore a flying plane, a landing plane, a fast plane and even meeting a sneezing plane!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: When Messy accidentally sets Farmer Fuddle's sheep loose, he must help round them up in time for their annual wool shearing. But will Messy be brave enough to get a fur cut of his own?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Nori and Preston are creating a circle of standing stones, just like the ancients of Swoppiton used to make. The stones are big - will it take more than Mojo's crane top to move them?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: Glitch takes all the sand from the Academy beach, leaving the local crabs with nowhere to hide from hungry seagulls. Can the Go Jetters repair the beach before it's too late?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 43
programme.desc: Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 7

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 43
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: When Glitch and Kyan race to the south pole, Glitch's Grimbots steal the pole's marker.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song "I Love The Rain".

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: Fitness guru, Garlic, has a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 42
programme.desc: Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 43
programme.desc: Supertato is due to receive the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 85
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of 'I Spy' where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 19
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'tiger' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see a stripy tiger, a swimming tiger, a cheeky tiger and Dee even has a tea party with a tiger!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Messy goes to Okido and learns how to 'jog' his memory,

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Preston is in costume as everyone's favourite character, Dewey Dragon, but he isn't ready for how demanding Dewey's fans are. Mojo and Bo need to help him escape the crowd.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 10
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Alaska's a cool place to watch the salmon run, but Glitch opens a 'fishy taxi service' to help the salmon avoid tricky waterfalls and greedy bears. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 41
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 44
programme.desc: At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 29
programme.desc: Andy takes to the skies in his safari-mobile, jetting off to the Amazon River in Brazil in search of a rare cichlid fish. Along the way, he has a run in with a hungry stingray.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch needs some help from the Playtimers to make hoopy owl bagels. It's time for a tasty adventure!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 27
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: Glitch offends some nomads in Mongolia, so it's down to the Go Jetters to take the reins.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 12
programme.desc: When notorious Diesel hides from the other engines, his plans backfire and he gets a surprise on Sodor.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: John has a problem with the origami flamingos he has made and needs Sarah and Duck's help.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 29
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.
